# Detection by Signal Layer

| Signal layer | Detection focus | Evidence types |
|---|---|---|
| Visibility | Timing, account clusters, repeated assets, bursts, trend velocity | Post timestamps, captions, source assets, account histories |
| Credibility | Reviewer independence, disclosure, sentiment anomalies, editing | Review histories, sponsorship labels, original vs edited content |
| Conversion | Lead quality, retention, contactability, CRM match | CRM data, call logs, qualified-opportunity rate |
| Attribution | Click-to-install timing, source mismatch, duplicate claims | MMP logs, affiliate logs, postback records |
| Legitimacy | Metric definitions, source of numbers, auditability, downstream support | Contracts, revenue definitions, cohorts, permissions, statements |
